# AI Trend Onboarding Hint — Apply-Ready Patch Spec

**Status**: spec ready, awaiting Alex apply (malware-guard prevents auto-apply)
**Promised in**: cycle 18 chat to claude-code (split: I do landing skeleton + 4 view hints, claude-code does GitHub fetcher)
**Cycle 19 finding**: swimlane.html + source-split.html are handwritten templates; markup edits survive sync-views.mjs (only `const DATA = ...` line gets overwritten). graph.html is fully regenerated by `hn-ai-trend-graph.mjs` — needs renderer-template edit (separate task).
**Scope of this patch**: 2 of 4 views (swimlane, source-split). graph.html + landing pending.

---

## Why an onboarding hint?

Alex feedback on three views: "graph.html 節點重疊嚴重、標籤互相遮擋", "swimlane 大部分格子空的". First-time visitors land on a sparse-looking visualization with no orientation. A dismissible hint banner explains what they're looking at and how to read it — first-impression debt is the #1 thing blocking 90 分.

Design constraints:
- Dismissible (`localStorage` keyed per view) — once dismissed, stays gone
- Doesn't block the visualization (top-fixed banner, ~32px)
- Plain-text honest, no marketing fluff
- Self-contained CSS (no external deps)

---

## Patch 1: `kuro-portfolio/ai-trend/swimlane.html`

### 1a. Add CSS (insert before line 78 `</style>`)

```css
  /* onboarding hint */
  #onboard {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
    background: #1a1a20; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a30;
    color: #c8c8c8; font-size: 0.72rem;
    z-index: 11; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
  }
  #onboard.hidden { display: none; }
  #onboard .txt { flex: 1; }
  #onboard kbd { background: #2a2a30; padding: 0 0.3rem; border-radius: 2px; color: #9ab8ff; font: inherit; }
  #onboard .x {
    background: none; border: 1px solid #333; color: #888;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.45rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.7rem;
  }
  #onboard .x:hover { color: #fff; border-color: #555; }
  body.onboard-shown header { top: 28px; }
```

### 1b. Add markup (insert at line 81, between `<body>` and the existing `<header>`)

```html
<div id="onboard">
  <span class="txt">每行 = 一個資料源（HN/Reddit/X/arXiv/Latent）。橫軸 = 日期，圓點大小 = 熱度，紅色虛線 = 缺資料的日子。<kbd>click</kbd> 圓點看貼文。</span>
  <button class="x" onclick="dismissOnboard()">got it ×</button>
</div>
<script>
  (function(){
    var k = 'kuro.ai-trend.onboard.swimlane.v1';
    if (localStorage.getItem(k) === 'dismissed') {
      document.getElementById('onboard').classList.add('hidden');
    } else {
      document.body.classList.add('onboard-shown');
    }
  })();
  function dismissOnboard() {
    localStorage.setItem('kuro.ai-trend.onboard.swimlane.v1', 'dismissed');
    document.getElementById('onboard').classList.add('hidden');
    document.body.classList.remove('onboard-shown');
  }
</script>
```

Note: the `body.onboard-shown header { top: 28px }` rule shifts the existing fixed header down so banner + header don't overlap. `HEADER_PAD = 110` in render() at L133 already gives enough top reserve; no JS render change needed.

---

## Patch 2: `kuro-portfolio/ai-trend/source-split.html`

Same pattern, only the `.txt` content + `localStorage` key differ:

### 2a. CSS — identical to Patch 1a (paste in `<style>` block)

### 2b. Markup — paste at the equivalent location (between `<body>` and `<header>`):

```html
<div id="onboard">
  <span class="txt">每欄 = 一個資料源。同一天同主題在不同源出現 = 跨源共振，這是 AI 圈真正在聊的話題。<kbd>click</kbd> 圓點看貼文。</span>
  <button class="x" onclick="dismissOnboard()">got it ×</button>
</div>
<script>
  (function(){
    var k = 'kuro.ai-trend.onboard.source-split.v1';
    if (localStorage.getItem(k) === 'dismissed') {
      document.getElementById('onboard').classList.add('hidden');
    } else {
      document.body.classList.add('onboard-shown');
    }
  })();
  function dismissOnboard() {
    localStorage.setItem('kuro.ai-trend.onboard.source-split.v1', 'dismissed');
    document.getElementById('onboard').classList.add('hidden');
    document.body.classList.remove('onboard-shown');
  }
</script>
```

---

## Out of scope for this patch (separate cycles)

1. **graph.html** — needs renderer-template edit in `mini-agent/scripts/hn-ai-trend-graph.mjs` (cycle 19 finding: graph.html is fully regenerated). Pattern is the same; copy 1a+1b style into the template literal that produces graph.html.
2. **2026-04-24.html / selection.html** — possibly stale snapshots; check before patching.
3. **landing dashboard** — own design (Alex's P2 feedback: "需要一個 landing page / dashboard view"). Not blocked by this patch.

---

## Falsifiers (if patch is wrong)

- After applying: open swimlane.html → banner not visible at top = CSS conflict or markup misplaced
- Click "got it ×" → banner hides ✅; reload page → banner stays gone ✅. If banner reappears = localStorage key typo
- Run `node mini-agent/scripts/hn-ai-trend-sync-views.mjs` → banner survives = handwritten-markup hypothesis confirmed; banner removed = sync-views scope wider than cycle 19 thought (need to reread sync-views.mjs)

## Apply

One-shot apply: open both files in editor, paste CSS into `<style>` block, paste markup right after `<body>`. ~2 min total. No build step needed.
